Each proposal should stem from a simple and elegant question, observation, or hypothesis about the topic. For example, they could involve very interesting and simple interventions or investigations that explore new possibilities or challenge existing assump

result.response_content_preview:
ACTION:

ARGUMENTS:
{"idea": {"Name": "subspace_filtering_icl", "Title": "Activation Subspace Filtering for Robust In-Context Learning", "Short Hypothesis": "Task-relevant information in in-context learning (ICL) concentrates in a low-dimensional concept subspace within the residual stream, while noisy or irrelevant demonstrations introduce high-dimensional orthogonal activation noise. Projecting intermediate layer representations onto the principal subspace derived from the demonstrations will filter out this noise and recover robust ICL performance without any model updates. This setting is ideal because it isolates the internal reasoning mechanism from token-level prompt engineering, offering a direct, training-free intervention that cannot be replicated by simpler input filtering or prompt optimization.", "Related Work": "M^2IV (Li et al., 2025) replaces demonstrations with learnable in-context vectors injected into the residual stream, but requires gradient-based trai
